untranslatable_reason: Signal relies on calendar-based month filtering (January entry/exit) and multi-index selection logic that cannot be expressed using the allowed technical indicators and operators. Month comparisons and index selection require calendar/data structure operations outside the indicator-based rule engine. The 'abnormal returns' statistical significance (p < 0.05) is a research finding, not a tradeable condition.
translation_notes: This is a seasonal/calendar anomaly signal from academic research (likely SSRN paper on January Effect in Indian indices). The core logic—buy three specific indices in January and hold through month-end—requires: (1) calendar month detection, (2) multi-asset selection logic, and (3) statistical significance validation. None of these are expressible as technical indicator conditions. A practical implementation would require preprocessing rules outside this engine.
